# Carbon Control

> Audit-grade Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions data platform for Indian manufacturers and their supply chain.

Carbon Control gives manufacturers versioned emission factors (CEA, IPCC, DEFRA), locked reporting periods, and full lineage from every entry to its factor of record.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, scopes covered, and factor sources.
- [Sign in](/auth): Access or create a Carbon Control workspace.
